message:
feat(abi): add 32 Tier 4 symbols — semaphores, message queues, shared mem, scheduler, pidfd

Major POSIX IPC and Linux-specific expansion:
- Shared memory: shm_open, shm_unlink
- Semaphores: sem_open, sem_close, sem_unlink, sem_wait, sem_trywait,
  sem_timedwait, sem_post, sem_getvalue, sem_init, sem_destroy
- Message queues: mq_open, mq_close, mq_unlink, mq_send, mq_receive,
  mq_getattr, mq_setattr
- Scheduler: sched_getscheduler, sched_setscheduler, sched_getparam,
  sched_setparam, sched_get_priority_min, sched_get_priority_max
- Shell: wordexp, wordfree
- Linux syscalls: signalfd, close_range, pidfd_open, pidfd_send_signal
- Time: clock_settime

Totals: 738 exported (387 Implemented, 192 RawSyscall, 159 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
